steps.title: Understand the constant function
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=42$. Because there is no $x$ term, the output is always $42$ no matter what input is used.

steps.title: Evaluate the listed inputs
steps.content: For the table inputs $0$, $1$, and $2$: $$f(0)=42$$ $$f(1)=42$$ $$f(2)=42$$ The correct table must have $42$ in every output row.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is the only table with outputs $42$, $42$, and $42$. The other choices show outputs that do not stay equal to $42$, so B is correct.
